title: thymus serpyllum var. aureus
intro: Thymus serpyllum var. aureus, also known as golden creeping thyme, is a low-growing, spreading herbaceous perennial plant belonging to the mint family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum var. aureus include reducing stress and anxiety, promoting relaxation, and supporting respiratory health, as well as its potential to alleviate symptoms of coughs and colds. This plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic benefits.
